pool.baseline: it just feels so heavy lately. like, everything we do, every little thing we struggle for, it’s just going to be swallowed by the void anyway. we're just biological accidents on a rock that doesn't even know we exist. how are you supposed to find any reason to keep going through the daily grind when none of it actually matters in the long run?

pool.baseline: it's too much. the wound in my side won't stop bleeding and the wind is just... it's freezing. i don't think i can make it to the next outpost. i'm just so tired of fighting for nothing. everything is just empty.

pool.baseline: i just dont see the point anymore. everything i do just makes things worse for my wife and the kids. i looked at the bills today and i just... i'm just a weight around their necks. if i wasn't here, they could actually breathe again.
